title: [BUG] Hyperlinks have no style
author: zoeesilcock

comments.author: jeffersoneagley
comments.body: I'm looking for something similar. Anyone know a good workaround?

comments.author: zoeesilcock
Flo0806
comments.body:
Hello!

First, thx for this great library - I love it! 
Will this bug be fixed? It's not the biggest problem but the user experience and the behavior that the user expects when working with hyperlinks is not given with the actual version.

Greetings, Florian

comments.author: jossue45
comments.body:
Use getColumn with the index column hyperlink.
    worksheet.getColumn(9).width = 20;

comments.author: PRR24
comments.body:
I think the best solution is currently:
```cell.font = { ...cell.font, underline: true, color: { theme: 10 } };```

10 is Excel's theme color for links.

comments.author: Flo0806
comments.body:
@PRR24 Perfect! This solves the main problem! The visited state works as well, too!

Thx!
